core_mechanism: optimization of a global collective objective over the topology and coupling structure of a network of interacting units, i.e. constrained optimization defined on a graph where the connectivity itself is the object being tuned or constrained
brief_reason: This is a Focus Issue overview rather than a single method, so the text only supports a coarse description; the most specific defensible machinery it names is 'optimization in collective behavior' realized on networked systems, i.e. optimizing a global objective over network structure/dynamics.
